Bash("c:/wamp64/bin/mysql/mysql8.4.7/bin/mysql.exe" -h 127.0.0.1 -P 3308 -u root gestorrutas -e "SELECT id, name FROM comerciales WHERE name REGEXP '\(^|[^0-9]\)R-?\(1[2-9]|20\)\([^0-9]|$\)' ORDER BY name;")

Bash("c:/wamp64/bin/mysql/mysql8.4.7/bin/mysql.exe" -h 127.0.0.1 -P 3308 -u root gestorrutas -e "SELECT c.id, c.name, c.address, c.active, com.name AS comercial FROM clients c JOIN comerciales com ON com.id=c.comercial_id WHERE c.comercial_id IN \(1,2,29\) AND c.active=0 ORDER BY com.name, c.name;")

Bash("c:/wamp64/bin/mysql/mysql8.4.7/bin/mysql.exe" -h 127.0.0.1 -P 3308 -u root gestorrutas -e "SELECT com.id AS com_id, com.name AS comercial, COUNT\(c.id\) AS total_clientes, SUM\(CASE WHEN c.ruta_id IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END\) AS sin_ruta_legacy, SUM\(CASE WHEN c.ruta_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END\) AS con_ruta_legacy FROM comerciales com LEFT JOIN clients c ON c.comercial_id = com.id WHERE com.id IN \(1,53,2,54,55,56,57,58,59,29\) AND c.active=1 GROUP BY com.id, com.name ORDER BY com.name;")

Bash("c:/wamp64/bin/mysql/mysql8.4.7/bin/mysql.exe" -h 127.0.0.1 -P 3308 -u root gestorrutas -e "SELECT c.id, c.name, com.name AS comercial, c.ruta_id, r.name AS ruta_actual FROM clients c JOIN comerciales com ON com.id=c.comercial_id LEFT JOIN rutas r ON r.id=c.ruta_id WHERE c.comercial_id IN \(1,2,29\) AND c.active=1 ORDER BY com.name, c.name;")

Bash("/c/wamp64/bin/mysql/mysql8.4.7/bin/mysql.exe" -h 127.0.0.1 -P 3308 -u root gestorrutas -e "SELECT DISTINCT INDEX_NAME, TABLE_NAME FROM information_schema.STATISTICS WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA='gestorrutas' AND TABLE_NAME IN \('distance_cache','client_schedules','clients'\) ORDER BY TABLE_NAME, INDEX_NAME;")
